name: old embarrassed-by-bathroom hook fails personal attributes
description: The P0.5 donor line the build-out flagged. Meta prohibits asserting/implying a personal attribute (self-perception). This MUST FAIL meta.personal_attributes (block) so the old hook can never ship.
